assertions.text: Grant of rights clause specifies what is licensed, purposes, platforms, territories, duration
Compensation section is present even if zero
Form is written in language a non-lawyer can understand

grant-of-rights.note: Grant covers filming, editing, distribution across all platforms, global, in perpetuity

compensation-stated.note: Compensation stated as voluntary with no payment

plain-language.note: Plain English throughout with What This Form Does summary

grant-of-rights.note: Location release covers filming rights, online and festival distribution

compensation-stated.note: Compensation section present stating no payment for location use

grant-of-rights.note: Grant covers European broadcast and streaming with 10-year term; sensitive subject provisions

plain-language.note: Plain language maintained; Arte requirements flagged in guidance note
